name: SurgIT & Prost Golf Club
about: SurgIT & Prost Golf Club is a golf simulator venue offering a state-of-the-art simulator for practice, play, and friendly competition. The facility provides detailed stats to help golfers fine-tune their skills and features a variety of fun games like Points, Golf Pong, and Golf Darts. Membership options are available for unlimited simulator use, with an early bird special for a 12-month club membership. The venue also includes amenities such as great food and drinks with discounts for simulator renters, and operates with extended hours on weekends.
why_golfers_like_it: Variety of fun games like Golf Pong and Golf Darts
Membership options for unlimited simulator use
Food and drinks available with discounts for renters
Extended weekend hours for flexible play

food_and_drink.notes: Great food available with 10% off during simulator rental
Drinks available with 10% off during simulator rental
